creator: olivier@freebsd.org
text:
Did you check your patch with a "poudriere testport" ?

Example against www/mattermost-server:

===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: %%WWWDIR%%/templates/globalrelay_compliance_export.html
Error: Orphaned: %%WWWDIR%%/templates/globalrelay_compliance_export_message.html
Error: Orphaned: %%WWWDIR%%/templates/globalrelay_compliance_export_participant_row.html
